title: BCFT conformal scaling in untrained GPT-2

hypotheses.H0: Untrained GPT-2 shows power-law conformal scaling Δ ≈ 0.25 in a comparable fraction of heads (SYK-near > 20/144). Conformal structure is architectural — does not require training.
hypotheses.H1: Untrained GPT-2 shows no systematic conformal scaling (SYK-near < 5/144). Training specifically develops conformal dynamics on top of the GOE substrate.

protocol.model: GPT2LMHeadModel(GPT2Config()) — random init, no pretrained weights
